title: Synthesis of Synthetic Evidence: Paper-Ready Statistical Tables and Findings
summary: Demo notebook synthesizing three upstream experiments into five paper-ready statistical analysis sections: Module Recovery Table (Jaccard index), End-to-End Accuracy (Friedman/Nemenyi tests), Signed vs Unsigned Ablation (Hedges' g effect sizes), Estimator Bias (CoI sign distributions), and Hypothesis Verdicts. Uses trimmed metadata from three experiment JSON files as input data, runs scipy statistical tests and scikit-posthocs Nemenyi comparisons, and produces a 4-panel visualization of key findings.
